subTitle: Udaya grants Indrani's plea, disregarding Chelvanayaki's protests. Later, Indrani arrives home accompanied by Shiva and Ayali, much to Rithika's annoyance.

subTitle: Deepa, a talented woman, faces discrimination due to her complexion. However, her life changes when she meets Karthikeyan, a businessman.

subTitle: A tragedy separates Bhoomi and Gagan from their fathers, but Bhoomi hopes to find her roots, while Gagan despises his father. As fate entwines them, will truth bridge the chasm between hope and hate?

subTitle: Bhagyalakshmi, a devoted and kind woman, marries Mithra, only for her world to shatter as he plots to abandon her for his lover.

title: Aval Varuvala
subTitle: Divya rejects Jeeva's love due to her traumatic past, revealing her psycho husband. Just as she agrees to marry Jeeva, her husband resurfaces, complicating her life.

title: Aval Varuvala
subTitle: Bhagyalakshmi, a devoted and kind woman, marries Mithra, only for her world to shatter as he plots to abandon her for his lover.

title: Varisu
subTitle: Janakambal wants her carefree grandson Cibi to take over her business. She brings in Tamil to guide him, but it's unclear if Cibi is ready to change his ways.

title: Gettimelam
subTitle: After facing humiliation from her family, Lakshmi vows to build a new house. Sivaraman joins her in this mission. But as they take on family responsibilities, will their dream be left behind?

title: Veera
subTitle: Veera and Kanmani's brother dies in an accident. Veera marries the driver, Maaran. Kanmani wants revenge. The story follows what happens next in this tragic story.

title: Chinnan Siru Kiliye
subTitle: Indhu, a self-made woman who won't bow or borrow, clashes with Karna, an enforcer of fear-driven patriarchy, triggering a powerful upheaval that shakes the empire everywhere.

title: Thirumangalyam
subTitle: Seetha faces family duties, social pressure, and love, seeking dignity through marriage and self-respect while balancing illegitimacy, relationships, and redemption in a restrictive society.

title: Parijadam
subTitle: After losing her parents and hearing in a tragic accident, Isai is forced to marry Vishal when her aunt Rukmini manipulates her horoscope to meet Subadra's strict astrological beliefs.

title: Ayali
subTitle: Ayali's family shunned her due to false accusations. She endures her stepmom's cruelty and joins Siva. They plan to expose Varma, proving her mother's innocence, seeking justice and family reunion.

title: Karthigai Deepam
subTitle: Deepa, a talented singer, faces discrimination as she's dusky. But meeting Karthikeyan, a successful businessman, changes her life drastically. Will Deepa be able to stand tall against societal norms?

title: Vaagai Sooda Vaa
subTitle: Sumathi raises Thenmozhi and Meenakshi with values; Thenmozhi marries into a debt ridden family, while Meenakshi marries Jeeva to protect Thenmozhi and restore the family's dignity.

title: Sandhya Raagam
subTitle: Separated sisters face new challenges. Sandhya's daughter, Maya, arrives at Janaki's home. Maya's modern ways influence Janaki's daughter, causing concern and tension in the household.

subTitle: Janakambal wants her carefree grandson Cibi to take over her business. She brings in Tamil to guide him, but it's unclear if Cibi is ready to change his ways.
